subcodes.first_line: This is a most great Day, yet the people are deprived thereof. Glory be to God! The luminous Countenance hath set forth towards the Mount [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این یوم بسیار بزرگست ولکن قوم از آن محروم سبحان الله طلعت نوراء قصد طور
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
